text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way back from an outing with Nice
Nature...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wait, someone's calling me.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Mom?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sorry Trainer, I gotta take this!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hi, Mom. You never call me like this. What's up?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah... I'm doing okay... I guess.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Really, I'm doing all right. Don't worry about me,
Mom!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What?! You're coming here?! When?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Aghhh, you always decide to visit so suddenly. All
right... Call me later.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Sorry to keep you waiting.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. It's still a bit away, though. Apparently, her
friend invited her on a trip.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
They're planning to stay around this area for
some time, so I'll go meet them when they come.
choice_data_list: Are you going to invite her to see you run?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Whoa, whoa, slow down there, will ya?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I-I mean, it's not like I don't want her to, but...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It's kind of embarrassing having my mom watch
me. It feels like I'm in elementary school...
choice_data_list: I'm sure she'd love to see you run!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Y-you think so?
choice_data_list: If I was your parent, I'd be over the moon!
If I was your parent I'd be over the moon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Surely her mother has some ulterior motive for
coming here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell Nice Nature that, if I was her mother, my
biggest motivation for going on this trip would be
to see my daughter's progress.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, you're starting to sound like a real parent
now.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
True, your jobs are pretty similar. But... are you
sure?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I mean, about what you said earlier. You know...
That my mom would love to see me run.
choice_data_list: Isn't she your number one fan?
Isn't she your number one fan?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...You're right. Even when I don't do well, she's
still cheering for me...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: All right, you win! ...I'll invite my mom.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that, as her trainer, I want her mom to
know how amazing of a student she is.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Student? Are you my teacher or something?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I mean, you're my trainer, so I guess you
technically are my teacher...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But do you think I'll be able to show her anything
special?
choice_data_list:
You've been hitting all your training goals, so
I'd say so!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature seems relieved to hear my positive
opinion of her.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Well, if you're so confident, you must have some
tricks up your sleeve, right?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Well, I hope you're ready for show-and-tell then, Teach.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Hello, Mom? About your visit...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
If you don't have any plans... do you want to
come visit Tracen Academy?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
No, you don't have to come if you're busy! I don't
know how fun it'll be just watching me run.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hm? Really? Okay... I'll tell my trainer.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: She said she's coming. And that she's excited.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Great. I can't be lame in front of her, so guess it's back to training for me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She pretends to sound fed up, but I can hear the
excitement in her voice.
